chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Const. Petition No. D- 702 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case. 1.For orders on office objection ‘A’ 2. For Hearing of main case. 15.10.2025. Mr. Sarfraz Ali Abbasi, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Addl.A.G. a/w Irfan Hussain Asstt: Accounts Officer. -------- Learned Addl. AG files statement on behalf of Respondent No.1, District Accounts Officer, Larkana and submits that the petition has served its purpose as the pensionary benefits of the petitioner have been credited to the account of the petitioner. In such view of the matter, learned counsel for the petitioner stands satisfied and does not press this petition. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge A.H.Qazi/**
